questionHtml:
A truck has an initial speed of 20 m s–1. It decelerates at 4.0 m s–2. What is the distance taken by the truck to stop?

 

A.   2.5 m

B.   5.0 m

C.   50 m

D.   100 m

meta.title: A truck has an initial speed of 20 m s–1. It decelerates at 4.0 m s–2. What is the distance taken by the truck to stop? A. 2.5 m B. 5.0 m C. 50 m D. 100 m
